title: fix: use actual Pollinations logo in official badge
author: pollinations-ai[bot]

gist.headline: A proper badge of honor
gist.blurb: The official Pollinations app submission badge finally features our actual logo instead of a placeholder circle. Wear it with pride!
gist.summary: Updated the GitHub tier app submission template to use the official Pollinations logo in the shields.io badge.
gist.impact: Contributors submitting their apps to the ecosystem will now get a badge with the correct branding.
gist.visual_concept: Polly the bee mascot proudly polishing or wearing a shiny new official badge, showing it off to the Monitor Robot.
gist.image_prompt: Cozy pixel art scene of Polly the bee mascot proudly polishing a shiny new digital badge. A chunky retro monitor robot looks on excitedly. Soft lime green (#ecf874) and pastel lavender gradient background. Chunky pixels, warm lighting, lo-fi aesthetic like Stardew Valley. Emotionally warm, nostalgic but beautiful.
